document_summary: Official Certification of Employment and Salary from Peking University's Office of Human Resources, confirming Dehuan Liu's position as professor since July 1992 with annual salary of 961,710 CNY and monthly salary of 80,142.50 CNY (pre-tax) for the period March 2021 to February 2022.
